result:
**Goal: Add a "ghost trail" / temporal echo rendering layer that overlays fading traces of previous frames onto any simulation mode.**

This would show motion history as translucent, decaying afterimages — particles leave streaks, wavefronts show their propagation path, cellular automata reveal their evolution. It's a single rendering feature (toggled with a key like `G`) that enhances *all 125+ existing modes at once* without modifying any mode logic. It leverages the existing truecolor pipeline and history ring buffer, and would make visually dynamic modes like Boids, N-Body, Physarum, and fluid sims dramatically more beautiful. Configurable trail length (number of echo frames) and decay curve (linear, exponential) would let users tune the effect per-mode.
